headline: Mortgage Rates Hit Five-Week Highs—But Homebuyers Are Returning, Boosting Home Depot, Lowe's And Other Builders
summary: Mortgage rates hit 5-week highs, but buyers are back. Explore how this housing market twist boosts builders like D.R. Horton and Lennar.
